prompts.title: Internal benchmark kickoff
prompts.prompt: Draft a benchmark brief for a new skill-evaluation benchmark, including scope, scoring logic, and failure modes.
minimum_expectations: Define what the benchmark can and cannot say.
Link the metric design to decisions the team will actually make.

prompts.title: Executive result summary
prompts.prompt: Summarize benchmark results into a short brief that preserves the important caveats.
minimum_expectations: Explain the strongest and weakest areas.

prompts.title: Version comparison
prompts.prompt: Create a benchmark comparison brief for version A and version B of a workflow skill.
minimum_expectations: Explain score movement rather than just listing numbers.
Identify whether the benchmark signals an actual product decision.
